title: Phase 4 — Security Hardening: Critical Bugs, Auth/Access, Quality

stories.title: Fix SIGTERM handler: proc.kill() on plain object
Fix command injection in backup.js: execSync(curl) → axios.get()
Fix command injection in /api/ssl/all: domain validation before execSync
AUTH_TOKENS TTL: 24h expiry, periodic eviction, 100-token cap
asyncHandler consistency: wrap 8 bare async routes
WebSocket auth: validate token on upgrade; wss.close() in SIGTERM
MCP app handlers call HTTP API on localhost
apps.yaml validation at startup and watchdog reload
Port scan input validation: integer range 1-65535, max 100 ports
Health check timer cleanup: clearTimeout on DELETE /api/health-check/:id
portless.js TOCTOU: move loadPortless() inside withWriteLock scope in registerService
Log rotation race: wrap rotate+append in withWriteLock
Webhook URL validation: validate HTTPS URL format before storing (SSRF guard)
Backup config + servers POST input validation
Restart endpoint uses stopApp()+startAppProcess() (fix watchdog bypass)
process.on('unhandledRejection') handler + yaml hoisted to top of server.js
Test coverage: path-traversal, token-auth, ssl injection tests
